title: $1,000 in NVIDIA at Start of 2015
description: What $1,000 invested in NVIDIA on January 2, 2015 would be worth today. NVIDIA was primarily known as a gaming GPU company. The rise of deep learning, data centers, and eventually generative AI transformed it into one of the most valuable companies in history.
dividend_note: NVIDIA pays a modest quarterly dividend. DRIP assumed throughout.
educational_note: NVIDIA's story illustrates how a company's core technology (parallel GPU computing, originally for graphics) can find a transformative new use case (AI training). The 2021 and 2024 splits together produced a 40x share multiplier.
